nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet Esq. was born in 1325, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Amice (Elizabeth) Corbet about 1356, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1359, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet Esq.は1325年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた。約1356年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでAmice (Elizabeth) Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet Esq.(은)는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Amice (Elizabeth) Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet Esq. родился в 1325 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Amice (Elizabeth) Corbet около 1356 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1359 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.
